case_title: MELODY DANIELS VS. AIMS- ACCLAMATION INSURANCE MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIELS, MELODY AS TO DEFENDANT AIMS- ACCLAMATION INSURANCE MANAGEMENT SERVICES NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-12-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-10-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-28-2006

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST MELODY DANIELS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-05-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-20-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: FLOYD L. BUTLER, CSR#2518. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To May-29-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/29/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard, CSR# 11055. (212)
